span.p:
**TimeSyncing**
· Waits for time sync
· Can be skipped by config

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
**Ready**
· Base environment is ready
· Waits for activation

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
**Activating**
· Initializes plugin resources
· Prepares agent context

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
**Activated**
· Plugin is activated
· Session can start

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
**Starting**
· Starts session flow
· Opens required services

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
**Sleeping**
· Enters sleep flow
· Pauses active interaction

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
**Slept**
· Agent is sleeping
· Waits for wake or stop

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
**WakingUp**
· Restores session resources
· Returns to running state

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
